items: Facilities Master Plan Adoption — final adoption of the FMP that would guide Measure S bond spending across the district

Siemens Building Management System — HVAC controls at Adelante Selby, Hoover, Roosevelt, Taft. $1,878,600 from Measure S Bond Fund. Sole-source justification: Siemens is the only vendor certified for the existing BMS infrastructure.

Blach Construction GMP Amendment 1 for HVAC Phase 1 — $19,741,877 Guaranteed Maximum Price for lease-leaseback HVAC replacement at Adelante Selby, Hoover, Roosevelt, Taft + temporary cooling. Amends original preconstruction agreement. Measure S Bond Fund.
Board Meeting Calendar for 2025-26 — discussion/adoption of regular and special meeting dates
3 Policy First Readings: visitors/outsiders (BP 1250), mobile communication devices (BP 5131), student promotion/acceleration/retention (BP 5123)
5 Policy Second Readings: school-connected organizations (BP 1230), volunteers (BP 1240), inter-district attendance (BP 5117), facilities fees (BP 1330), joint use agreements (BP 1330.1)
Siena Youth Center/Sequoia YMCA Afterschool — $435,000 (Expanded Learning Opportunity Program Grant)
i-Ready Diagnostic Assessment — $195,400 renewal for K-8 reading and math assessments
Measure U Parcel Tax Disbursements for multiple schools
Resolution No. 25 — Declaration of Need for Fully Qualified Educators (Ed Code 44225.7)
RCAA Labor Agreement — administrators union compensation, $717K impact
RCTA Teacher Contract Ratification — $1,540,000 total impact
CSEA Classified Staff Agreement — $986,000 total impact

llmResponse.consent_vote_words: The School Board approved the Consent Items (Weekly, King; 5-0), taking the following action:

items.intro_words: Action: 7.1 Adoption of Final Facilities Master Plan
Action: 7.2 Approval of Siemens Building Management System for Mechanical Controls
Action: 7.3 Approval of Guaranteed Maximum Price (GMP) Amendment 1 to Facilities
Discussion: 8.1 Discussion of the Board Meeting Calendar for the 2025-26 School Year
Discussion: 8.2 First Reading and Discussion of Board Policy 1250: Visitors/Outsiders
Discussion: 8.3 First Reading and Discussion of Board Policy 5131.8 Mobile Communication Devices
Discussion: 8.4 First Reading and Discussion of Board Policy/Administrative Regulation 5123
Action (Consent): 9.1 Approval of the May 28 Board Meeting Minutes
Action (Consent): 9.2 Second Reading and Approval of Board Policy/Administrative Regulation 6158
Action (Consent): 9.10 Approval of the i-Ready Contract for the 2025-26 School Year
